posts.author: DavidSchenkler (David Schenkler | monday ambassador cohort 7)
posts.cookedHtml:
Monday quietly added the new feature to view run data on Workflow Builder. This has greatly helped with finding what data was changed, what parameters were going in, and etc. This is especially helpful when looking for errors or why the workflows failed.

This was a great addition!
